# Jungle Pickleball

> Jungle Pickleball is an indoor pickleball club in Ojochal, Costa Rica (the Southern Zone / Costa Ballena), serving Ojochal, Uvita, and Dominical. Four covered courts, open play for all skill levels, a pro shop, cold plunge recovery, and a social lounge. Play rain or shine.

## Key facts
- Location: Calle Tucan, Ojochal, Puntarenas, Costa Rica (9.0841707, -83.6431412)
- Contact: WhatsApp +506 8989 3111 (ask for Roger)
- Hours: open daily, 7:00 AM to 7:30 PM
- Opened: May 2023
- Courts: 4 indoor, covered, pro hard surface
- Amenities: free fiber WiFi, equipment rental and pro shop (official Honolulu Pickleball Company dealer), cold plunge recovery, social lounge with food and drinks, practice dink wall
- Pricing: visitor drop-in $15 per 90 minute session ($12.50 each for multiple sessions); memberships from $200
- Open play: Tuesday and Thursday at 10:00 AM; Friday and Sunday at 8:30 AM; alternating sessions Monday, Wednesday, Saturday (message to confirm)
- Beginners welcome: all skill levels, free paddles and balls, no partner needed
- Reviews: rated 4.8 out of 5 on Google across 24 reviews. Visitors highlight the welcoming owners (Roger and his wife), clean covered courts, helpful staff, and the friendly community.

## Upcoming events
- Rihana's Rally Cup, Sunday May 31, 2026 (practice 8:00 AM, games at 9:00 AM): a Mix and Match Madness fundraiser celebrating local sprinter Rihana Mora's 17th birthday. Adults $25, kids under 16 $15, family $30. Partial proceeds fund Rihana's training and travel.

- Book or ask a question (WhatsApp): https://wa.me/50689893111
